topic: Growth partner commission tracking — what gets logged automatically and what no longer needs a spreadsheet
format: Open with the specific operational problem, then show how one SmartPro Hub feature addresses it end-to-end
post:
Every growth partner deal tracked in a separate spreadsheet is a commission dispute waiting to happen.

Someone updates their file. Someone else updates theirs. By month-end, you've got three versions of the truth and no clear record of who referred what, when, or for how much.

SmartPro Hub builds partner commission tracking directly into the deal pipeline. The moment a deal hits closed-won, the referring partner, rate, and payout amount are already logged. That's it. No manual entry, no chasing the sales team, no reconciling two spreadsheets at midnight before payroll.

Some of our customers run partner programs across 50+ active referral relationships this way — without adding headcount or scheduling weekly syncs just to keep the numbers straight.

The commission history lives on the deal record. Auditable. Timestamped. Visible to whoever needs it.

If your current process depends on someone remembering to update a shared sheet, that's not really a process. It's just optimism.

What's the one part of your partner program that still runs on manual trust?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feature-spotlight
